market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience exclusive luxury at this cinema-equipped 3BR home with space for 7 guests. The private movie theater room (complete with reclining seats and surround sound) sets this listing apart - perfect for movie nights or post-event relaxation. Strategically located near Jaguar Land Rover (12-minute drive), NEC (8 miles) and Birmingham Airport (15 miles), you'll save hours on commutes. While our base rate is 12% below the city average (£175/night), guests consistently praise our location's convenience and property's comfort (4.84-star rating from 67 reviews). Enjoy the convenience of a fully staffed home with three floors providing privacy for all guests. Book now to claim availability during our 68 open nights in the next 90 days.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Lead with the cinema room photo first to showcase the strongest differentiator - this unique feature will capture attention and reduce guest hesitation about the price vs. occupancy gap.
key_diagnosis: £154.6/night rate is 12% below the market median but occupancy (23.9%) still trails the cohort average (28.3%)
Title doesn't prioritize the cinema feature which could attract premium price in this market
No amenities listed despite hosting 7 guests - missing high-impact categories like parking & outdoor spaces
analysis.outreach_hook: Your pricing is competitive at £154.6/night (12% below median) but occupancy still lags by 4.4 percentage points vs. the market average.
